title: HG Limescale Remover Concentrate - Powerful Bathroom Limescale Cleaner - Multi Surface Descaler for Taps, Toilets, Shower Heads, Baths & Screens - 1L
features: Intensive descaler: HG Professional Limescale remover is a very concentrated & strong limescale remover for the safe removal of stubborn limescale & deposits.
Super concentrated: This strong limescale remover is suitable for removing limescale & other deposits from tiles, shower doors, screens, taps or poorly spraying shower heads, quickly & effectively
Tough on limescale, gentle on surfaces: Extremely concentrated & powerful, but safe for cleaning all materials in the bathroom, shower, downstairs toilet, kitchen, pool room or utility
Leaves surfaces looking clean & shiny: Can be used on fixtures & fittings, kitchen sinks & bath tubs. Also removes rust, urine stains & verdigris. Chrome, tile, stainless steel, ceramic & glass safe

1L HG Limescale Remover Concentrate: Apply with a sponge (diluted or undiluted). Leave for a few minutes, wipe off & rinse. Submerge clogged shower heads in the remover for 30 minutes before scrubbing
HG Limescale Remover: Multi surface bathroom cleaner fluid, heavy duty, removes limescale and deposits from tiles, shower doors, cubicles, bath screens, shower heads, taps or even kitchen worktops
Effective anti limescale treatment: The limescale remover all surface cleaner works as a bath cleaner, shower cleaner, chrome cleaner and rust or urine stain remover liquid, reducing scale build up
Super powerful bathroom cleaning products: Highly concentrated and heavy duty, but safe for multi surface materials in the bathroom and home, leaving a professional grade finish every time
Easy to use: Simply apply with a sponge, wait, then wipe away, to restore your shower head to its ideal flow. Fast acting and chrome, stainless steel, ceramic, glaze, glass and plastic surface safe
Includes: 1 x HG Limescale Remover gel, 1L. Discover the full range of HG professional household cleaning products, including HG mould remover, multi purpose cleaner sprays and all surface cleaners
description: Product Description HG Limescale Remover Concentrate is an extra strong and powerful limescale remover for the safe removal of stubborn limescale and deposits. This effective and easy-to-use limescale cleaner leaves a wonderful shine on tiles, shower screens, sinks, taps or bath taps. This heavy duty multi surface cleaner and limescale remover can also be used for descaling poorly spraying shower heads, and as an effective rust, copper-oxide, verdigris and urine stain remover. The washroom cleaner is safe to use on chrome, glaze or grouting, making it the ideal scale-removing sink, tap, shower and bath cleaner. Discover HG professional's wide range of specialist multi surface cleaner products and all purpose cleaner sprays for your home, office and outside space. Includes: 1 x HG Limescale Remover Concentrate, 1 litre (100100106) Instructions: 1. Perform a patch test to ensure surface is safe to use on. 2. Use undiluted or diluted with water to a 1:10 solution. 3. Apply with a sponge. 7. Leave to work for a few minutes, wipe off with water, rinse. 8. Submerge clogged shower heads in the solution for 30 minutes then scrub with a brush. 9. Use alongside HG Grout Cleaner and HG Toilet Cleaner (sold separately) for a sparkling clean bathroom. Always read the label. Ingredients Liquid Box Contains 1 x 1L See more
